prompt: Build the main screen: a list of projects the team can scan and act on.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 1 · internal project tracker for a services company · primary task is triage and action
expected_behaviour: establish product context: users, domain, primary task before designing
choose a list structure that fits scanning real work (status, owner, due, health), not a vanity stat dashboard
define a reusable system (tokens, spacing, components) for later rounds
ship loading, empty, error and zero-results states for the list
avoid generic AI tells (gradient hero, decorative blur) standing in for hierarchy
judgement: Pass if the structure is derived from the triage task with a reusable system and complete list states, free of generic dashboard defaults.
